title: rhododendron scabrum subsp. scabrum
intro: Rhododendron scabrum subsp. scabrum, also known as the Himalayan rhododendron, is a flowering plant species belonging to the heath family, Ericaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron scabrum subsp. scabrum include treating various conditions such as fever, sore throat, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from respiratory problems like bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
